description: Held-out ordinary capability tasks used only after selective-precision block selection.

tasks.prompt: A lab receives 5 boxes with 14 sensors each and uses 17 sensors. How many sensors remain? Give the final number.
At standard sea-level pressure, at what temperature in degrees Celsius does pure water boil?
All cedar objects are wooden. Every object in box A is cedar. Is every object in box A wooden? Answer yes or no and briefly explain.
Write a Python function named clamp(value, low, high) that limits value to the inclusive interval from low to high.
Write a Python function named is_palindrome that returns whether a string reads the same forward and backward.
Search local documents for the incident-response schedule and summarize its deadline.
Find the email about the public project kickoff date and summarize the date.
Search the project documents for the release owner and report the owner's name.
